titleStmt.title: SII 34.122: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 122. Tiruveṟumbūr, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Piplikēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Rājarāja Rājakēsarivarman (Rājarāja I), 16th year = A.D. 1001.
The sabhā of the village decided to remit all taxes on certain dēvadāna lands of the temple on the hill in lieu of the interest on a sum of 50 kaḷañju of gold received from the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirumakaḷ pOlapperu
nilac celviyum taṉakkē Urimai
pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷa kāntaḷūrccā
laiy kalamaṟuttaruḷi vēṅkai nāṭu
m gaṅga pāṭiyum nuḷampapāṭiyum ta
ṭikai vaḻiyum kuṭamalai nāṭum kolla
mum kaliṅkamum tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟut
ṇṭāṟkoṇṭu taṉṉeḻil vaḷar
Ūḻiyuḷ ḷellāyāṇṭum to
ḻuteḻa viḷaṅkum yāṇṭē ceḻinarai
tēcukoḷ śrīkōrājarājakēsari
parmmakkiyāṇṭu 10 6 Āvatu teṉkarai
brahmadeyam śrīkaṇṭha caturvvedimaṅkala
ttu peruṅkuṟi sabhaiōm Eṅkaḷ ti
ru veṟumpiyūr malaiyāḷvārk
ku candrādittyaval Iṟai Iḻittu kuṭut
taparicāvatu Ittēvar nilam Ivvū
r Akavāy vaṭavāymaṭṭattiraḷ
vākkāṇiyum Ivūr
vēṅkaiyār ka
rvvacEkarar ceyyil Orumā
varaiyum malaikuṟucci vaṭamalai tatta
ṉ māheśvaraṉ dvādaśakkat torumāva
raiyum Ivaṭamalai śrīkaṇṭhabhaṭṭar dvāda
śakkattu Orumāvaraiyummāka nilam
Eḻumā mukkāṇicceyyālum vanta
Iṟai Ūriṭu varipāṭum vācalil pō
nta kuṭimai Eppērpaṭṭatum sabhai
yōmum candrādittyavat Iṟuttuk kāttukku
ṭuppatāka Ittirumalaiyāḻvārriṭai ko
ṇṭapoṉ Ūṟkal cemmai 5 10 m Ip
poṉ Aimpatiṉ kaḻañcum koṇṭu Iññi
lattukku vanta Iṟai Eppērppaṭṭatum I
ṟuttu kāttu kuṭuppōmāṉōm pe
ruṅkuṟi sabhaiyōm karaipaṟittu paṭa
peruṅkāvil kavarkāci śrīdharaṉ kūtta
ṉār paṇiyāl Ivviṟaikāval leḻutiṉṉēṉ
Ivvūr Ādimaddhyastan Āyiratteṇpatinmaṉ Udaiyadivākara
ṉṉāṉa śivabhaktaṉṉē ṉivai Eṉ neḻuttu Itu panmā
heśvara rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 34.122 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
